intro:
Pirarucu is on a shopping spree!
The spending just won’t stop!
A simple yet addictive shopping runner!
description:
A mountain of coins suddenly appears before Pirarucu, who loves shopping more than anything!
With this much money, she might be able to shop to her heart’s content!
Grace and elegance? Out the window.
Pirarucu dashes forward—leaping over cliffs, stomping enemies, and dodging fireballs… for all in the name of shopping!

This spin-off mini-game from Goonya Monster stars series favorite Pirarucu.
Spend your coins or save them—it’s all part of your strategy!
Charge through a wild and unpredictable shopping run!

◇ Simple controls!
Use jumps and double jumps to navigate the stage.
Timing is everything!
Easy to learn, fun for players of all ages.

◆ Become the ultimate shopaholic runner!
At checkpoints, you can spend your coins on skills and items to boost your run.
Go on a spending spree too fast, and you’ll run out of coins in no time—so spend wisely. (That goes for everything.)

◆ Danger lurks along the way…!
Enemies and fireballs will try to stop your run.
Crash into them, and it’s game over!
Stomp enemies to clear your path, and dodge fireballs with well-timed jumps.

◆ Shopping is a race against time!
Pirarucu keeps accelerating as she runs.
Push forward through the chaos and make it to the next checkpoint!

◇ Battle mode (Offline 2-player mode)
In battle mode, Pirarucu’s stepbrother Clione joins the action from Goonya Monster!
Use items and outplay your opponent to collect more coins before time runs out.
Jump on your rival to steal their coins—it’s all part of the competition!
